title: Track Skip-Rate Leaderboard

landmines.name: divide-by-zero-never-played
landmines.kills: LEFT JOIN from all tracks includes never-played tracks with 0 plays; skips/plays divides by zero (runtime error on Postgres, NULL rows on SQLite/MySQL). The >=50 threshold must gate the ratio.

landmines.name: null-ms-in-denominator
landmines.kills: Using COUNT(*) as the denominator counts NULL-ms plays as non-skips, inflating the denominator and understating the skip rate; NULL ms_played must be excluded from both numerator and denominator.

landmines.name: skip-threshold-wrong-unit
landmines.kills: A skip is ms_played < 30000 (30 seconds in milliseconds). Writing ms_played < 30 (seconds) or ms_played < duration_sec (seconds) mixes units and finds almost no skips.

notes: Verified identical on sqlite, duckdb, postgres; standard SQL also runs on mysql. mssql omitted for consistency.
